title: ophrys stavri
intro: Ophrys stavri, also known as the bee orchid, is a species of orchid native to Greece and the surrounding areas. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Ophrys stavri include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it useful in treating conditions such as bronchitis and sore throats. Ophrys stavri can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are often used to support immune function and alleviate respiratory congestion.
